sections.paragraph:
Original: בּשׂר

Transliteration: bâśâr

Phonetic: baw-sawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. flesh
    1. of the body
      1. of humans
      2. of animals
    2. the body itself
    3. male organ of generation (euphemism)
    4. kindred, blood-relations
    5. flesh as frail or erring (man against God)
    6. all living things
    7. animals
    8. mankind

Origin: from H1319

TWOT entry: 291a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
